member.name: T:PdfSharp.Diagnostics.NRT
member.summary: Helper class for code migration to nullable reference types.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Diagnostics.NRT.ThrowOnNull(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an InvalidOperationException because an expression which must not be null is null.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Diagnostics.NRT.ThrowOnNull``1(System.String)
member.summary: Throws InvalidOperationException. Use this function during the transition from older C# code to new code that uses nullable reference types.
member.typeparam: The type this function must return to be compiled correctly.
member.param: An optional message used for the exception.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Diagnostics.NRT.ThrowOnNull``2(System.String)
member.summary: Throws InvalidOperationException. Use this function during the transition from older C# code to new code that uses nullable reference types.
member.typeparam: The type this function must return to be compiled correctly.
The type of the object that is null.
member.param: An optional message used for the exception.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.ChecksumHelper.Calculate(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculate the Adler-32 checksum for some data.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.ChecksumHelper.CalcChecksum(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Calculates an Adler32 checksum combined with the buffer length in a 64-bit unsigned integer.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.SyMsgId
member.remarks: The enum value should be fixed over time, but the enum name must be stable in the future. This is because the name is the link to any kind of outer resources, e.g. an entry in the PDFsharp technical reference.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.MessageIdOffset
member.summary: Offsets to ensure that all message IDs are pairwise distinct within PDFsharp foundation.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.GfxMsgs.Generic(System.String)
member.summary: Use as a generic hack during development.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.SemVersionInformation
member.summary: Internal public fields with semantic versioning information.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.SemVersionInformation.BranchName
member.summary: The name of the current Git branch.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.SemVersionInformation.CommitDate
member.summary: The date of the last commit.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.SemVersionInformation.Sha
member.summary: The SHA of the last commit.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.SemVersionInformation.ShortSha
member.summary: The short SHA of the last commit.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.IErrorMessageInfo.Id
member.summary: The integer value of the error enum.

member.name: P:PdfSharp.Internal.IErrorMessageInfo.Name
member.summary: The name of the error enum.

member.name: M:PdfSharp.Internal.SyMsgs.Generic(System.String)
member.summary: Use as a generic hack during development.

member.name: T:PdfSharp.Internal.UrlLiterals
member.summary: URLs used in PDFsharp are maintained only here.

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.UrlLiterals.LinkToAssetsDoc
member.summary: URL for missing assets error message. "https://docs.pdfsharp.net/link/download-assets.html"

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.UrlLiterals.LinkToMigraDocFontResolving
member.summary: URL for missing MigraDoc error font. "https://docs.pdfsharp.net/link/migradoc-font-resolving-6.2.html"

member.name: F:PdfSharp.Internal.UrlLiterals.LinkToCannotOpenPdfFile
member.summary: URL shown when a PDF file cannot be opened/parsed. "https://docs.pdfsharp.net/link/cannot-open-pdf-6.2.html"
